## Purpose

This document is a self-contained strategic intelligence report covering the entire Ask My Notes codebase as of 2026-05-27. It is designed to be pasted into a future Claude conversation to inform strategic planning decisions about product direction, monetization, growth, fundraising, and operational priorities.

It is not a code review — it is a **commercial intelligence document** built on a code review.

---

## Methodology

- **Live filesystem scan** of `c:\Users\Shafi\ask-my-notes` on 2026-05-27
- **Reconciliation** against the project's own audit docs (`PROJECT_PROGRESS_REPORT.md`, `TECH_DEBT_AUDIT.md`, `FEATURE_STATUS_MATRIX.md`, `SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md`, `NEXT_DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP.md`, dated 2026-05-15/16)
- **Market research** synthesized from `market_research_report.md`, `marketing_strategy_debate.md`, `marketing_roadmap.md`, and public-domain knowledge of the Indian EdTech / global student-productivity landscape
- **Verification of critical findings** via direct code inspection (security routes, pricing source-of-truth, dead-code candidates, middleware presence)
- **Cost modeling** using OpenAI public pricing (gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, embeddings, Whisper, TTS) as of 2026-05

---

## How to read this document

Each section is self-contained and tagged at the start for fast extraction:
- **Executive readers:** start with the Executive Summary, then jump to Phase 10 (Recommendations) and Phase 6 (Monetization).
- **Engineering readers:** start with Phase 1 (Inventory), Phase 3 (Tech Debt), Phase 4 (Architecture).
- **Commercial readers:** start with Phase 5 (Competitive), Phase 6 (Monetization), Phase 7 (Growth).
- **Investor due-diligence:** Phase 9 (Metrics) + Phase 8 (Risks) + Phase 10 (Recommendations).

Section markers in the document take the form `## Phase N — Title`. Each phase ends with concrete next actions.
